title: OpenAI
description: Skills for interacting with OpenAI services, including image generation, image-to-text conversion, and other AI capabilities

image_to_text.title: Image to Text
image_to_text.description: Convert images to detailed text descriptions using OpenAI's GPT-4o model

dalle_image_generation.title: Image Generation by DALL-E
dalle_image_generation.description: Generate images using OpenAI's DALL-E model based on text prompts

gpt_image_generation.title: Image Generation by GPT
gpt_image_generation.description: Generate images using OpenAI's GPT-Image-1 model based on text prompts

gpt_image_mini_generator.title: Image Generation by GPT Mini
gpt_image_mini_generator.description: Generate images using OpenAI's GPT-Image-1-Mini model based on text prompts

gpt_avatar_generator.title: Avatar Generation by GPT Mini
gpt_avatar_generator.description: Generate avatar-ready profile images using OpenAI's GPT-Image-1-Mini model

gpt_image_to_image.title: Image Editing by GPT
gpt_image_to_image.description: Edit images using OpenAI's GPT-Image-1 model based on text prompts

states.description: States for each OpenAI skill (disabled, public, or private)
